title: Add using groups of 10 and 100
description: Practice making groups of 10 and 100 while adding 3-digit numbers.
topic_path: Get ready for addition, subtraction, and estimation
Strategies for adding two and three-digit numbers

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blank.**

| | 
- | - | -
$\purpleD{66} + \blueE{72}~$ is the same as [[☃ numeric-input 2]] $+{}\blueE{70}$ | |
hints:
We can move ${2 \text{ ones}}$ from ${72}$ to ${66}$.
$\begin{align}
\purpleD{66}+\blueE{72}=&\purpleD{66}+(\blueE{2} + \blueE{70})\\\\
=&(\purpleD{66}+ \blueE2)+\blueE{70}\\\\
=&\goldE{68}+\blueE{70}
\end{align}$
$\purpleD{66} + \blueE{72}$ is the same as $\goldE{68} +{}\blueE{70}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blank.**

| | 
- | - | -
$\purpleD{93} + \blueE{45}~$ is the same as $\purpleD{90} + {}$ [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | |
hints:
We can move ${3 \text{ ones}}$ from ${93}$ to ${45}$.
$\begin{align}
\purpleD{93}+\blueE{45}=&(\purpleD{90}+\purpleD{3}) + \blueE{45}\\\\
=&\purpleD{90}+ (\purpleD3+\blueE{45})\\\\
=&\purpleD{90}+\goldE{48}
\end{align}$
$\purpleD{93} + \blueE{45}$ is the same as $\purpleD{90} + \goldE{48}$

\end{align}$
$\purpleD{138}+ \blueE{710}$ is the same as $\goldE{148} + \blueE{700}$.
